pi_items.source: Verified against the task description which explicitly states to 'Save this specific column configuration as a new view named 'RTM_Audit''.
Verified against the task description which instructs to open the 'SRS' document. The ExampleProject/documents/SRS.json file also exists with matching ID.
Verified against the task description which instructs to show linked test cases from the 'TESTS' document. The ExampleProject/documents/TESTS.json file exists with matching ID.

Verified against the task description which requires displaying 'ID', 'Description', and 'Status'. Analysis of SRS.json shows these map to valid column/attribute IDs used in ReqView ('id', 'description', 'status').

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the ReqView Example Project (synthetic software requirements data). The user must create a new view named 'RTM_Audit' in the 'SRS' document. This view must include standard columns ('id', 'description', 'status') and a traceability column linking to the 'TESTS' document.
